betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6PUREX§f (Plutonium Uranium Reduction EXtraction) is a 5x5x5 pseudo-multiblock for advanced nuclear fuel reprocessing.

§ePurpose:§f
• Reprocess depleted fuel to recover §bPlutonium§f and §bUranium§f
• §bVitrify liquid nuclear waste§f into stable glass
• Extract §bSchrabidium§f from advanced fuels

§eRequired Fluids:§f §bNitric Acid§f and §bKerosene§f (fed into 3 input slots)

§eRecipe Groups (Auto-Switch):§f
1. Reprocessing §bZIRNOX Fuel§f
2. Reprocessing §bPlate Fuel§f
3. Reprocessing §bPWR Fuel§f
4. Reprocessing §bWatz Pellets§f
5. §bSchrabidium Extraction§f

§eSchrabidium Extraction:§f From §bSchraranium§f, ZIRNOX plutonium fuel, or PWR MEP/MEN fuel - §amore efficient than centrifuging§f.

§aPower:§f Internal buffer of §b1.0 MHE§f - dedicate power infrastructure.

§aTips:§f
• §aAuto-Switch Groups§f - Set to one recipe and machine auto-switches within that group
• Use §bTemplate Button§f (like Chemical Plant) to lock recipes
• Higher yields than lower-tier reprocessing methods
